nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Close the door, {{playerName}}. We need to talk about where this franchise is headed. I'm not seeing the results I expected.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I understand the frustration, Mr. {{npcName}}. But I have a clear plan for this offseason that will turn things around.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: What specifically are you unhappy with? I want to make sure we're aligned on expectations.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: You're right to be disappointed. I take full responsibility for this season.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: I've heard that before. What makes this offseason different? Give me specifics.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: I want a playoff team. Period. I don't care if it's through trades, free agents, or the draft. Just make it happen.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: ...At least you own it. Not many people in your chair would say that. I'm giving you one more year. Make it count.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Here's what I'm thinking: target two impact bats in free agency and trade from our pitching depth. We can be contenders by the All-Star break.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I need a bigger budget to make this work. Can you approve an additional $20M in payroll?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Fine. But this is the last time I open the checkbook without results. Don't waste it.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: The budget is what it is. You need to be more creative with what you have.

on_thin_ice.description: Owner is running out of patience.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Sit down, {{playerName}}. I just wanted to say — hell of a job this year. The fans are excited, the numbers are up, and we're winning.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Thank you, sir. The players deserve the credit. I just put them in a position to succeed.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: It feels good! This team has something special. I think we can make a real run at it.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: I'm extending your contract and bumping your budget. Keep doing what you're doing.

praised.description: Owner is thrilled with your performance.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: I'll make this quick, {{playerName}}. We've decided to go in a different direction. Today is your last day.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I understand. I wish things had worked out differently. I gave this organization everything I had.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: This is a mistake. The roster I built is about to turn the corner. You're throwing away three years of development.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Can you tell me what specifically led to this decision?

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: The record speaks for itself. We haven't made the playoffs in three years. The fanbase is losing patience, and frankly, so am I.

fired_gracefully.description: You've been relieved of your duties.
